name: Rice Krispie Butterscotch Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butterscotch chips and peanut butter over low heat until blended.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Add Rice Krispies to the mixture.
4. Press half of the mixture into a buttered 8x8 pan.
5. Chill in the refrigerator.
6. Combine chocolate chips, sugar, butter, and water.
7. Stir over hot water until well blended.
8. Spread over the chilled cereal mixture.
9. Spread remaining cereal mixture over top.
10. Chill for 10 minutes before cutting into squares.
